biohub_init.message0: Initialize Bio Sensor Hub %1 reset %2 mfio %3
biohub_init.tooltip: Create and initialize the SparkFun Bio Sensor Hub for heart rate and SpO2

biohub_is_ready.tooltip: Returns Bio Sensor Hub init status

biohub_config_bpm.message0: Bio Sensor Hub %1 configure BPM mode %2
biohub_config_bpm.tooltip: Configure Bio Sensor Hub for heart rate reading

biohub_config_sensor_bpm.message0: Bio Sensor Hub %1 configure sensor and BPM mode %2
biohub_config_sensor_bpm.tooltip: Configure sensor and BPM output from Bio Sensor Hub

biohub_read_bpm.message0: Bio Sensor Hub %1 read BPM data
biohub_read_bpm.tooltip: Read a BPM data set from the Bio Sensor Hub

biohub_read_sensor_bpm.message0: Bio Sensor Hub %1 read sensor and BPM data
biohub_read_sensor_bpm.tooltip: Read a sensor and BPM data set from the Bio Sensor Hub

biohub_value.tooltip: Get a specific value from the last Bio Sensor Hub reading

biohub_set_pulse_width.message0: Set Bio Sensor Hub %1 pulse width %2
biohub_set_pulse_width.tooltip: Set the LED pulse width for heart rate measurement

biohub_set_sample_rate.message0: Set Bio Sensor Hub %1 sample rate %2
biohub_set_sample_rate.tooltip: Set the Bio Sensor Hub sample rate

biohub_set_adc_range.message0: Set Bio Sensor Hub %1 ADC range %2
biohub_set_adc_range.tooltip: Set the Bio Sensor Hub ADC range
